name: envpact
description: Resolve secrets from a private Git-backed vault into project .env maps.
long_description: envpact is a centralised, serverless secrets manager for solo developers managing 100+ public GitHub repositories. One private vault repo (~/.envpact/secrets/) stores every secret; every project references shared keys via `shared.KEY` syntax. Rotate once → every project picks up the new value next run. This MCPB bundle ships a self-contained Node-based stdio server with all dependencies bundled — no global Node install required, drag the .mcpb onto Claude Desktop and it just works.

vault_path.title: Vault directory
vault_path.description: Path to your local envpact vault clone. Defaults to ~/.envpact/secrets — leave the default unless you've set up the vault elsewhere via `envpact-cli --init`.

default_project.title: Default project name (optional)
default_project.description: Override the project auto-detected from the workspace's git remote. Most users should leave this empty.
